HTRules.GeneralRules1: Hawaiian Tiki is a 6-reel (3 rows in reels 1 and 6, 4 rows in reels 2 and 5, 5 rows in reel 3 and 4) video slot featuring expanding Wild symbol.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{3600} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 3,600 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

HTRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

HTCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
HTCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
HTCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
HTCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on reels 3 and 4 only.

HTExpandingWildSymbol.Title: Expanding Wild Symbol
HTExpandingWildSymbol.ExpandingWildSymbolExplaination1: After a winning round, any Wild symbol on reels 3 and 4 will remain on the reels and a new Wild symbol will be added below the bottommost existing Wild symbol.
HTExpandingWildSymbol.ExpandingWildSymbolExplaination2: If there is no space to add a Wild symbol at the bottom, a new Wild symbol will be added above the topmost existing Wild symbol instead.
HTExpandingWildSymbol.ExpandingWildSymbolExplaination3: If there are 5 Wild symbols in reels 3 or 4, all 5 Wild symbols in the reels will not remain in the next round and no new Wild symbol will be added.

HTFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
HTFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
HTFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: At the end of every free spin, if there are 1 to 4 Wild symbols in either reel 3 or reel 4, the Wild symbol(s) will remain on the reel in the next free spin with an addition of a Wild symbol.
HTFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: 2 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere during the Free Spins Feature will award 4 more free spins.
